L0.release_rule: existing heuristic_rh release set for reproduction compatibility
L0.cp_backend: same evaluation backend as heuristic_rh baseline

L1.release_rule: L0 plus direct job predecessor/successor and incumbent-machine neighbors

L2.release_rule: L1 plus M3 propagation and M4 disturbance motif operation clusters

L3.release_rule: entire pending rolling-window release set, matching full_reoptimization

seed_policy: Frozen episode seed from each source episode; no regenerated traces.
